rulings.Case Title: CHARLES LI VS. THAI MING CHIU et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Of Plaintiff Charles Lis Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication Of Issues
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 25, 2015 line 2. PLAINTIFF CHARLES LI's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication Of Issues Continued to July 14, 2015 on Court's own motion. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MAUREEN DUNNE VS. CHRISTINE T. CHU ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 25, 2015 line 3. CROSS DEFENDANT ONE RINCON HILL ASSOCIATION's DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT Sustained with leave to amend. The third cause of action is uncertain as to whether breach of contract or contractual indemnity is asserted. Plaintiff shall have a 10-day leave to amend to allege separately, in good faith, each element of a cause of action for breach of contract and/or a cause of action for contractual indemnity. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: STEVE LIN VS. SUSAN D. TIMNEY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Special Motion To Strike Second Cause Of Action
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 25, 2015 line 1. DEFENDANT SUSAN TIMNEY's Special Motion To Strike Second Cause Of Action Hearing Required to address applicability of Feldman v. 1100 Park Lane (2008) 160 Cal.App.4th 1467 and litigation privilege to the intentional misrepresentation cause of action. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: STEVE LIN VS. SUSAN D. TIMNEY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 25, 2015 line 4. DEFENDANTS SUSAN TIMNEY and LYNDA KRETLOW's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, this complaint does not assert an unlawful detainer, possession is not sought. Arguments advance for the first time in reply are not proper. = (501/REQ)
